name: Leofoto Tripod Carbon LY-224C+LH-25
description: Leofoto LY-224C+LH-25R Carbon Fiber Tripod is a versatile tripod that can handle a variety of cameras and lenses. It has a maximum height of 141 cm, making it ideal for shooting low to the ground. This tripod has a four-legged design, which makes it easy to fold and carry anywhere. It only weighs 1kg,
